    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ColumnGeneratorFactory
    RowContext.project(Function<E,String> selector)
    A ColumnGeneratorFactory that projects one field of this context's entity for each row.

    Methods in io.bloviate.db that return ColumnGeneratorFactory
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ColumnGeneratorFactory
    ColumnConfiguration.generatorFactory()
    Returns the value of the generatorFactory record component.
    static ColumnGeneratorFactory
    Distributions.normal(double mean, double standardDeviation, double min, double max)
    A normal (Gaussian) double distribution clamped to [min, max].
    static ColumnGeneratorFactory
    Distributions.normalInt(double mean, double standardDeviation, int min, int max)
    A normal (Gaussian) int distribution, rounded and clamped to [min, max].
    static ColumnGeneratorFactory
    Distributions.recentTimestamps()
    Recency-skewed timestamps over the generator's default five-year window.
    static ColumnGeneratorFactory
    Distributions.recentTimestamps(Instant start, Instant end, double skew)
    Recency-skewed timestamps over [start, end] with the given skew (1.0 = uniform).
    static <T> ColumnGeneratorFactory
    Distributions.weighted(Map<? extends T, ? extends Number> weights)
    A categorical distribution over the given values, each weighted by its (relative) probability.
    static ColumnGeneratorFactory
    Distributions.zipfian(int size)
    A Zipfian (power-law) distribution over [1, size] with the classic exponent 1.0.
    static ColumnGeneratorFactory
    Distributions.zipfian(int start, int size, double exponent)
    A Zipfian (power-law) distribution over [start, start + size) with the given exponent.
